header.label: MY WORK
header.description:
A collection of projects where design meets
function and every pixel has a purpose.
Built to solve problems and create experiences
that matter.

projects.title: TrackSphere
projects.subtitle: Performance Analytics Dashboard for Athletes & Teams
projects.description: A performance analytics dashboard for athletes and teams.
projects.longDescription: TrackSphere is a powerful analytics platform designed to help athletes and coaches monitor performance, analyze trends and make data-driven decisions to achieve peak performance.
projects.challenge: Athletes and coaches needed a unified platform to track performance, analyze data and gain actionable insights. Existing tools were either too complex, expensive or lacked real-time capabilities.
projects.approach: I focused on building an intuitive and fast platform with real-time analytics, beautiful visualizations and seamless user experience across all devices.

projects.title: RideMate
projects.subtitle: Your cycling companion for tracking rides
projects.description: Your cycling companion for tracking rides, routes and milestones.
projects.longDescription: RideMate is a mobile-first application designed for the modern cyclist. It provides seamless tracking of every pedal stroke while offering deep insights into your cycling journey.
projects.challenge: Tracking rides often requires multiple apps that don't talk to each other.
projects.approach: Creating a unified mobile experience with offline support.

projects.title: TrailX
projects.subtitle: Discover epic routes and plan adventures
projects.description: Discover epic routes, plan adventures and connect with riders.
projects.longDescription: TrailX is a community-driven platform for outdoor enthusiasts to share and discover the best trails around the world.
projects.challenge: Fragmented information about trail conditions and difficulty.
projects.approach: Building a centralized hub for crowdsourced trail data.

projects.title: CycleCart
projects.subtitle: Redesigning the e-commerce experience
projects.description: Redesigning the e-commerce experience for cycling gear.
projects.longDescription: CycleCart is a UI/UX case study focused on optimizing the conversion funnel for a high-end cycling equipment retailer.
projects.challenge: High cart abandonment rates in the premium cycling segment.
projects.approach: Deep user research and iterative prototyping.

bottomQuote:
BUILDING DIGITAL EXPERIENCES
THAT DRIVE REAL IMPACT.
